Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.geometry_building_type_recs" AS geometry_building_type_recs, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, avg(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" * 1) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption__mean" 
FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS bs 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs."in.state" = 'CO' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/40a1050c2afcbc5d4b7f892de8a78e519a062d724f1167884cedf6edbabc0a67/fb24ba12-2b6c-4036-b037-cb761ec4e10e/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
